mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN next_deadline IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, next_deadline ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE deleted = 0 AND status <> N'제출완료' AND next_deadline IS NOT NULL AND next_deadline >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND next_deadline <= DATEADD(day, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_reporting WHERE deleted = 0 AND status <> N'제출완료' AND next_deadline IS NOT NULL AND next_deadline < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_reporting ( report_name, report_type, regulatory_body, legal_basis, frequency, last_submission, next_deadline, assignee, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{reportName}, #{reportType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{regulatoryBody,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{legalBasis,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{frequency,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{lastSubmission,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status}N'준비중', #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_reporting SET report_name = #{reportName}, report_type = #{reportType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, regulatory_body = #{regulatoryBody,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, legal_basis = #{legalBasis,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, frequency = #{frequency,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, last_submission = #{lastSubmission,jdbcType=DATE}, next_deadline = #{nextDeadline,jdbcType=DATE}, assignee = #{assignee,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_reporting SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
